title: scapha spadicea
intro: Scapha spadicea is a plant species that belongs to the family of Rubiaceae and is commonly known as the Woodruff plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scapha spadicea include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
